name: Official San Diego Chargers Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix vinegar, chili powder, and salt to make the chili dressing.
2. Coarsely mash the avocado with the chili dressing.
3. Add onion, diced chiles, tomato, and crumbled bacon to the mashed avocado mixture.
4. Place shredded lettuce in individual plates.
5. Mound guacamole onto the centers of the plates.
6. Arrange tortilla chips around the edges of the plates.
7. Garnish with ripe olives as desired.
